entry.title: OpenAI's Codex Desktop App Gets Smoother Navigation for Long AI Threads
entry.summary: OpenAI ships a batch of Codex app polish: smoother long-thread scrolling, a new navigation rail, better Settings search, and zoom-level UI fixes.

entry.title: Sakana AI's Fugu-Ultra Hits Vercel by Orchestrating Frontier Models as One
entry.summary: Sakana AI's Fugu-Ultra, a multi-agent orchestration system rivaling frontier models, is now one API call away on Vercel's AI Gateway with no markup pricing and BYOK support.

entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos 5 Returns After US Government Lifts Infrastructure Ban
entry.summary: After a 15-day government-ordered freeze over jailbreak fears, Anthropic's most powerful cybersecurity AI is back online for critical infrastructure defenders

entry.title: Google AI Studio Ships Design Variations to Fix Vibe Coding's Biggest Flaw
entry.summary: Google AI Studio's new Design Variations button generates multiple UI layouts instantly, solving the hardest part of vibe coding: describing visual aesthetics

entry.title: NVIDIA's Nemotron 3 Ultra Tops US Open-Weight AI on Brutal New Job Benchmark
entry.summary: Artificial Analysis launches AA-Briefcase, a new agentic benchmark for long-horizon knowledge work, where NVIDIA's Nemotron 3 Ultra ranks among the top open models

entry.title: Artificial Analysis Ships Model Sets to Cut Repetitive Comparisons Across 542 Models
entry.summary: Artificial Analysis launches Model Sets, letting users save and instantly apply custom model groups across all benchmark charts on the platform.

entry.title: Google Boosts Gemini Nano on Pixel 50% Faster Without Retraining
entry.summary: Google retrofits Multi-Token Prediction onto frozen Gemini Nano v3, delivering 50%+ faster on-device inference on Pixel 9 and 10 without touching the base model

entry.title: Google's Antigravity 2.0 Ships Audio Support and Built-in Skill Guide
entry.summary: Google Antigravity 2.0 gets a built-in guide skill, audio rendering, and smarter file search in its latest CLI and app update

entry.title: NVIDIA Shrinks GLM-5.2 Memory by 1.8x With NVFP4 Without Losing Accuracy
entry.summary: NVIDIA's official NVFP4 checkpoint of GLM-5.2 is now live on vLLM, cutting memory ~1.8x vs FP8 while matching accuracy on Blackwell GPUs.

entry.title: Microsoft's MAI-Code-1-Flash Beats Claude Haiku 4.5 by 16 Points at 60% Fewer Tokens
entry.summary: Microsoft's first in-house coding model ships inside GitHub Copilot, beating Claude Haiku 4.5 by 16 points on SWE-Bench Pro while using 60% fewer tokens

entry.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Launches Under Unprecedented U.S. Government Restrictions
entry.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 family launches in limited preview at US government request, with Sol setting new agentic coding and cybersecurity benchmarks at a new naming tier structure

entry.title: Cerebras Bets on Grassroots Builders to Challenge Nvidia City by City
entry.summary: Cerebras launches a global Ambassador Program to seed grassroots AI communities around its record-breaking inference platform, fresh off a blockbuster IPO.
